payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Light wood rectangular wall-mounted picture frame with glass and an off-white mat holding a printed document or poster showing blue and black text/graphics; full front view visible (not cropped) with slight reflection on the glass, photographed from approximately 0.8 m away.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"light wood rectangular frame","long_description":"Light wood rectangular wall-mounted picture frame with glass and an off-white mat holding a printed document or poster showing blue and black text/graphics; full front view visible (not cropped) with slight reflection on the glass, photographed from approximately 0.8 m away.","attributes":["light wood frame","rectangular","glass front (reflective)","off-white mat","printed document/poster inside","blue and black text","wall-mounted","full view (not cropped)"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
